title: Immersive Portals Recipes
description: Crafting Recipes for the Immersive Portal Mod
body:
This mod adds two recipes to minecraft so you can use the [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals?version=1.20.1) mod in survival.
![The two crafting recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3fba54549b54394289c4855daab119ded028cf2.png)

It also allows the portal helpers to be mined with a diamond pickaxe or higher.

I recommnend using the [**Immersive Portals, Survival Compatibility**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-portals-survival-compatibility) mod by **fuzi0ncraft**. This mod gives you access to the immersive portal commands throught a GUI. It gives you the same functionality that the creative sticks do but makes it easier in survival. As of now this Mod is only available on curseforge.
